DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. MOTION GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAUSKOPF SHALL SERVE FULL, VERIFIED RESPONSES TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES [SET ONE] AND POST-JUDGMENT REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS [SET ONE] WITHIN 14 DAYS OF THE HEARING. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED; SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE SUM OF $290. IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS STAYED FOR 14 DAYS; IF JUDGMENT CREDITOR SERVES RESPONSES WITHIN 14 DAYS, AS ORDERED, SANCTIONS SHALL BE PERMANENTLY STAYED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel answers to post Judgment discovery and for monetary sanctions. Motion granted. Judgment Debtor Mauskopf shall serve full, verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] and Post-Judgment Request for Production of Documents [Set One] within 14 days of the hearing.
Request for Sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290. Imposition of sanctions stayed for 14 days; if judgment creditor serves responses within 14 days, as ordered, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2008 Continued To Jul-03-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
